# databasus_workspace (Data Source)

A data source to get information about a configured Workspace in Databasus

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "databasus_workspace" "example" {
  id = "some-uuid-value-of-an-existing-workspace"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The workspace Id to fetch details for

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when this workspace was created
- `name` (String) The name of the workspace
